title: Revolve Group Announces Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2024 Financial Results
text: Revolve Group announced strong fourth-quarter and full-year 2024 results, demonstrating significant operational improvements and profitable growth. Fourth quarter 2024 net sales totaled $293.7 million, representing 14% year-over-year growth and beating analyst expectations by 4.26%. Full-year 2024 net sales reached $1.13 billion, up 5.7% from $1.07 billion in 2023, reflecting improving growth momentum through the year. Fourth quarter diluted EPS of $0.17 exceeded the consensus estimate of $0.10 by 70%, with full-year 2024 diluted EPS of $0.71 beating estimates by 88.89%. Net income in Q4 2024 totaled $12 million, tripling from the prior year quarter, while full-year 2024 net income of $49.6 million increased 76% from FY 2023. The company achieved significant operational leverage, with adjusted EBITDA increasing 114% year-over-year in Q4 to $18 million. Segment performance was strong, with REVOLVE segment net sales increasing 15% and FWRD segment net sales increasing 11% year-over-year. For 2025, management provided gross margin guidance of 52.4%-52.9% and marketing spend guidance of 14.9%-15.1% of net sales, targeting continued profitable growth while investing in brand building and physical retail expansion.
